CVE-2014-0466.title: The fixps script in a2ps 4.14 does not use the -dSAFER option whe ...
CVE-2014-0466.description: The fixps script in a2ps 4.14 does not use the -dSAFER option when executing gs, which allows context-dependent attackers to delete arbitrary files or execute arbitrary commands via a crafted PostScript file.
